overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval rural village with thatched-roof huts, passing a child and later a mounted rider, with a windmill visible in the distant countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village lane with wooden cottages

events.description: child runs past Geralt from behind, moving ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village, swords on back, observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: child in red cap running ahead along the dirt path

entered.detail: wooden hut with straw roof and weathered planks
rustic wooden picket fence lining the path
unpaved village road with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunny medieval village with traditional thatched-roof cottages and wooden fences lining a dirt path. A child in a red cap runs past him heading in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge with large oak tree and watchtower

events.description: mounted rider on horseback appears in the distance ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, approaching a mounted figure in the distance

notable_agents.action: mounted rider on horseback traveling along the dirt road ahead

entered.detail: massive ancient oak with thick trunk and spreading branches
wooden lookout tower visible behind the cottages

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as Geralt passes a large oak tree, transitioning from the dense village to a more open area. A mounted rider appears in the distance ahead, and a wooden watchtower becomes visible behind the cottages.

events.description: Geralt overtakes the mounted rider who moves off to the side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the countryside path, passing the mounted rider

notable_agents.action: mounted rider on dark horse moving along the path, later passed by Geralt

entered.detail: patch of blooming sunflowers alongside the dirt path
traditional wooden windmill with rotating blades in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an open countryside path lined with sunflowers, overtaking a mounted rider on horseback. A traditional windmill stands in the distance to the right, and the village cottages give way to open fields.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with corpses and distant windmill

events.description: dead bodies appear scattered on the side of the dirt path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path, observing the dead bodies on the ground

entered.detail: corpses lying on the ground beside the path, suggesting recent violence
golden wheat crops growing in the field to the right

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more desolate as Geralt passes dead bodies lying on the ground, suggesting danger in the area. The landscape opens into fields of wheat with the windmill now distant, and the village structures are left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunny, lived-in medieval village into a desolate and dangerous countryside. It begins on a dirt path lined with thatched-roof cottages and wooden fences, where a child in a red cap runs past Geralt. As the path opens up beside a large oak tree, the dense village structures give way to a more expansive view featuring a wooden watchtower and a distant mounted rider. The scene then shifts into the open countryside, moving through vibrant fields of sunflowers and passing the rider while a traditional windmill appears on the horizon. Finally, the landscape turns grim as the camera passes dead bodies lying on the ground, leaving the village behind for wide, lonely fields of wheat.
